problem: How to predict drug-receptor binding affinity from molecular structure without wet lab?

hypothesis: How to predict drug-receptor binding affinity from molecular structure without wet lab? remains unsolved because previous research missed the role of Optical. Optical neural network for speed-of-light inference directly addresses this.
